DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Line 6
Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk Kevin Lee, Not On The Record, D501
Appearances:
No appearance by the plaintiff.
Attorney D. Dennis La, Esq. of Anglin Flewelling Rasmussen through Court Call (626) 535-1900 EXT 514, counsel for defendant / Moving Party
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and with only the Moving Party being present rules as follows: The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendant's Demurrer is SUSTAINED without leave to amend as to the 1st and 2nd Causes of Action. Homeowners' Bill of Rights cannot apply retroactively. Defendant's Demurrer is SUSTAINED with leave to amend as to the 3rd and 4th Causes of Action. Plaintiff to plead with specificity for UCL claim. Plaintiff to plead more facts to show legal duty owed by Defendant to Plaintiff.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).
